context: Story 16.7 Phase 7 — Pro-Tier Benchmark after MCP Tool-Steering Fixes (FR-021 truncation marker, FR-022 hidden-content hint, FR-023 fill_form streak detector, FR-024 evaluate anti-pattern scanner)

notes.T4.7: Interactive budget exceeded (2585 > 2000). Free-baseline reported 200 interactive tokens for 240 interactive elements which is numerically impossible (0.83 tokens per element). Investigation: generate() function unchanged since e827439 (story-12.3). Hypothesis: Free-baseline 2026-04-06 agent passed wrong/truncated values to verify (e.g. measured empty container before click or wrong subtree). Honest Pro measurement reports 6037 all / 2585 interactive subtree tokens.
notes.T5.6: chrome://crash skipped (same as Free-baseline) to keep session alive.

friction_observed.FR-021_truncation_marker: VERIFIED — Generic containers show '…[+N chars; use filter:"all" with ref to read subtree]' on read_page
friction_observed.FR-022_hidden_content_hint: VERIFIED — 'Note: N text/content nodes (table cells, paragraphs, static text) are not shown by filter:"interactive"' appears on every read_page call
friction_observed.FR-023_fill_form_streak_detector: PARTIAL — triggered after 2 consecutive type calls in T6.2/T6.4 inputs that are in DIFFERENT test cards, not a shared form. False positive across unrelated fields.
friction_observed.FR-024_evaluate_anti_pattern_scanner: VERIFIED — emitted '.innerText/.textContent' hints on every content-read evaluate call (T3.6, T4.3, T5.3 verify, T6.7 goal read, T4.7 result read)

notes.evaluate_usage: This run used evaluate 13 times, most for legitimate purposes (iframe access T3.2, canvas pixel scan T3.4, DOM reorder for drag T3.3, contenteditable innerHTML T3.6, large-DOM needle T4.3, runner verify calls T5.3-T5.6, SPA pushState T5.5, computed-style override T6.5/T6.7, T4.7 verify call). Anti-pattern scanner hints appeared on 5 of those, not all were actionable (iframe/contenteditable/canvas/data-attribute lookups are legitimate).
